thought.text: Task 5 已是满分。让我确认代码完整性并验证更多测试集：

reasoning_content: Task 5 is already at 100/100. Let me verify the implementation is still intact and the tests are passing. Let me also check the score files for the other test categories (classic, mini-performance, performance).

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && ls build/test/task5/score*.txt 2>/dev/null && for f in build/test/task5/score*.txt; do echo "=== $(basename $f) ==="; grep "总分" $f; done

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && ls build/test/task5/score*.txt 2>/dev/null && for f in build/test/task5/score*.txt; do echo \"=== $(basename $f) ===\"; grep \"\u603b\u5206\" $f; done", "summary": "Check all task5 score files"}
